name: Monkey D. Luffy
overview: The crew's fearless, rubber-bodied captain. Loud, loyal, and allergic to giving up, he sails toward the sea's greatest treasure with a straw hat and an open heart.

locked.title: A Family Name
locked.hint: His bloodline turns out to be anything but ordinary.

name: Roronoa Zoro
overview: The crew's first mate and three-sword swordsman, chasing a promise to become the strongest blade on the sea. Stoic, fearless, and famously bad with directions.
relationships: A fierce, unspoken loyalty to his captain

locked.title: An Old Vow
locked.hint: The promise that drives his blade — and the friend behind it.

name: Nami
overview: The crew's brilliant navigator and map-maker, with a dream of charting the entire world. Sharp-tongued, quick-witted, and the one who actually keeps the ship on course.

locked.title: Her Hometown's Secret
locked.hint: The truth about where she comes from, and the debt she carries.

name: Sanji
overview: The crew's chivalrous cook, who fights with his legs to keep his hands safe for cooking. Romantic to a fault and devoted to never letting a soul go hungry.

locked.title: A Hidden Lineage
locked.hint: The family he never speaks of.

name: Nico Robin
overview: A calm, well-read archaeologist with a quiet past and an encyclopedic knowledge of history. She joined the crew after a long arc of mistrust and now reads the world as easily as a book.
affiliations: Once tied to a secret organization
relationships: Slowly learning to trust the crew

locked.title: What She Seeks
locked.hint: The reason she chases history — and what it once cost her.

name: Tony Tony Chopper
overview: The crew's earnest reindeer doctor, who ate a fruit that lets him walk and talk like a person. Gentle, easily flattered, and braver than he believes himself to be.
relationships: Looks up to the whole crew like family

locked.title: The Doctor Who Raised Him
locked.hint: The mentor behind his dream of healing.

name: Brook
overview: A cheerful, courteous skeleton with a love of music and an unusual sense of humor. Found alone after many years adrift, he is searching for a way to keep an old promise to a friend.
affiliations: Once sailed with a music-loving crew
appearances: Introduced during the Thriller Bark arc
relationships: Haunted by the memory of an old crew
A whale waits for him somewhere

locked.title: His Past Voyage
locked.hint: The full story of his old crew.

locked.title: A Joining
locked.hint: What he decides at the end of this arc.

name: Usopp
overview: The crew's self-styled brave warrior of the sea and dead-eye sniper. A spinner of tall tales with a surprisingly true aim — a coward at heart who shows up when it counts most.
relationships: A loyal, lifelong bond with the crew

name: Franky
overview: A cola-powered cyborg shipwright with a flair for the dramatic and a genius for building ships. Loud, sentimental, and fiercely proud of his unbreakable creations.
relationships: Built the crew a dream of a ship

name: Jinbe
overview: A fish-man master of Fish-Man Karate and a man of unshakable principle. Honorable, powerful, and slow to break a promise once it is given.
appearances: First seen during the Summit War
relationships: Bound by deep debts of honor
